title: trifolium stellatum var. xanthinum
intro: Trifolium stellatum var. xanthinum, also known as the yellow star clover, is a perennial legume native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Western Asia. It has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of yellow star clover include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Yellow star clover can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies and traditional medicine.
